treatment_information.specific_treatment: CT-guided placement of a pigtail catheter into the gallbladder fossa fluid collection

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted with worsening right upper quadrant pain and fever
CT imaging performed to assess for cystic duct stump leak
Surgery performed to place pigtail catheter

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up in the Acute Care Surgery clinic as per discharge instructions
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Mental status clear and coherent, alert and interactive
